overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through the vineyard countryside of Toussaint. The character travels from open terraced vineyards through a stone village entrance and back into flowering meadows with distant mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced vineyard countryside with stone walls

events.description: passing opposing horse riders on the vineyard path

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a dirt path through terraced vineyards, maintaining a steady canter

notable_agents.action: NPC rider on horseback traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: rolling hills with structured vineyard rows and green vegetation
low stone boundary walls lining the dirt path
stone building with a small tower visible on the hilltop ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character riding through sunlit vineyard countryside. Terraced hills flank both sides of the dirt path, bordered by stone walls. The rider passes other horse-mounted NPCs traveling in the opposite direction as they approach a distant stone farmhouse with a tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: village entrance with stone archway and cypress trees

events.description: passing through the stone archway entrance into the village

agents.ego_description: riding through a stone archway gate, transitioning from open countryside into a village

entered.detail: tall stone archway marking the village entrance, flanked by cypress trees
stone structures with tiled roofs becoming visible beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches a prominent stone archway entrance flanked by tall cypress trees. Passing through the archway marks the transition from open vineyard countryside into a more enclosed village setting, with stone buildings becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with stone houses and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: navigating a horse through narrow village streets, passing between stone buildings and NPC villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a building entrance watching the rider pass

entered.detail: distinctive two-story stone building with red tiled roof and wooden beams
traditional stone cottages with wooden doors and small windows

segments.scene_description: The rider moves through the enclosed village interior, navigating between historic stone buildings with red tiled roofs. The path is narrow and cobblestoned, with NPC villagers standing near doorways. Wooden beam structures and awnings line the street as the character progresses toward the village exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: flowering orchard path with blooming trees

events.description: exiting the village back into open countryside with flowering trees

agents.ego_description: riding along a dirt path lined with flowering trees, passing NPCs walking on the trail

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the path in the same direction as the rider

entered.detail: trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the path
trees with purple flowers visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the scene opens into a picturesque countryside path lined with flowering trees displaying white and purple blossoms. The rider passes pedestrians walking along the trail as the environment transitions from built structures back to natural terrain with stone walls and vineyard sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow with distant mountain views

events.description: distant snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: riding through open meadows with expansive views of distant mountains, following the dirt path

notable_agents.action: group of villagers walking ahead on the path toward the mountains

entered.detail: large snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon ahead
rustic wooden fence running alongside the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals expansive open meadows with distant snow-capped mountains dominating the horizon. The rider follows a dirt path bordered by wooden fences, passing groups of villagers walking ahead. The landscape opens completely with grassy fields and scattered trees under the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sunlit terraced vineyards of the countryside, through a historic stone village, and back into an expansive mountain landscape. It begins with a rider traveling along a dirt path flanked by stone walls and terraced hills, passing other horsemen as they approach a distant farmhouse tower. As the rider reaches a prominent stone archway framed by tall cypress trees, the scene shifts from the open countryside into an enclosed village of narrow cobblestone streets and red-tiled buildings. The camera then follows the rider out of the village and through a picturesque trail lined with white and purple flowering trees, where the built environment gradually gives way to natural terrain. Finally, the landscape opens completely into wide meadows bordered by wooden fences, revealing a horizon dominated by distant snow-capped mountains under a bright sky.
